seo.title: Sound Equipment Rentals — BEATROX
seo.description: Beatrox provides professional sound equipment rentals for concerts, events, and activations — including PA systems, monitors, mixing consoles, and on-site audio engineering.

og.title: Sound Equipment Rentals — BEATROX Portland
og.description: Professional PA systems, consoles, and monitoring with experienced engineers — Beatrox sound equipment rentals for concerts and events.

hero.headline: Sound Equipment Rentals
hero.subheadline: Professional PA systems, consoles, and monitoring — with experienced engineers who know how to make them sing.

body.content: Great sound is the foundation of every great event. Beatrox provides professional-grade audio equipment rentals backed by our team of experienced engineers — from intimate brand activations to large-format concert productions. Every rental comes with the option of on-site engineering support.

body.heading: Equipment & Engineering
body.content: Our sound rental inventory includes line array PA systems, digital mixing consoles, stage monitor systems, wireless microphone systems, and in-ear monitor setups. Our Audio Engineer Joshua Vallejos brings 15+ years of touring and live sound experience to every project, ensuring your audio is impeccable from soundcheck to last note.

body.heading: Common Equipment
items: L-Acoustics, d&b audiotechnik, and Meyer Sound systems
DiGiCo, Yamaha, and Midas digital consoles
Shure, Sennheiser, and Lectrosonics wireless systems
Scalable from 100-person rooms to 5,000+ capacity venues
